title: lichen_link_strerror switch has gaps - several LICHEN error codes not mapped
description:
Location: lichen_util.h:60-90

**What goes wrong:** The switch statement covers EINVAL, ENOMEM, EMSGSIZE, EOVERFLOW, EALREADY, and LICHEN_EAUTH, but LICHEN link layer likely defines additional error codes. Any unmapped error falls through to "unknown error", making debugging harder.

**Impact:** User sees "Frame RX failed: unknown error (-42)" in logs and has to grep the source to figure out what -42 means.

**Fix:** Add a comment documenting which LICHEN error codes exist and ensure all are covered. Or change the default case to print the numeric value: "error %d" so at least the number is visible.
